name: auto-format
description: Auto-format files after Claude writes or edits them
author: sieteunoseis

hooks.name: Prettier on write/edit
hooks.description: Runs prettier --write on files after Claude creates or edits them

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; npx prettier --write "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
